name: 14" Sunburst Outdoor Throw Pillows Yellow - Room Essentials™
description:
Add a modern, natural vibe to your favorite outdoor space with this Sunburst Outdoor Throw Pillow Yellow from Room Essentials™. Made with UV-, water- and fade-resistant material, it's perfect for slow sunny days, lounging outdoors, summer picnics and BBQs, or bringing a touch of bright coziness to the backyard. Mix and match with your existing outdoor decor for a fresh look this season.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
